task_description: Write a Python function `factorial(n)` that returns n! and verify it works for n=5 (should print 120).
Print the FizzBuzz sequence for numbers 1 through 15 (Fizz on multiples of 3, Buzz on multiples of 5, FizzBuzz on multiples of both, otherwise the number).
Use a single shell command to print the integers 1 through 5 separated by newlines.
